data.title: validate.sh: hook-drift check reports FAIL instead of SKIP when .pre-commit-config.yaml absent
data.description:
## Problem

validate.sh check_hook_drift() returns rc='skip' when .pre-commit-config.yaml is absent, but report_check() and tally_check() have no skip handler for hook-drift. The string 'skip' falls through to the FAIL else-branch.

## Expected Behavior

hook-drift should display SKIP when .pre-commit-config.yaml is absent, matching the pattern used by the migrate check.

## Actual Behavior

hook-drift: FAIL appears in validation output. Causes spurious triage issues in /dso:debug-everything.

## Proposed Fix

Add skip handler for hook-drift in both report_check() and tally_check(), matching migrate's pattern.

## Reproduction

Run validate.sh in any repo without .pre-commit-config.yaml.

## Severity

P3 — false-positive validation failure.
